Published

Market Overview

Brief qualitative summary of BTC this week — trend, key levels, notable events.

Code 
df = pd.read_csv("../../data/org/marketdata/BTCUSDT_15m_2000-11-21 00:00:00_2026-02-23 00:00:00.csv", index_col=0)
df["open_time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["open_time"])
week = df.tail(672)  # ~1 week of 15m candles

print(f"Open:  ${week['close_price'].iloc[0]:,.2f}")
print(f"Close: ${week['close_price'].iloc[-1]:,.2f}")
print(f"High:  ${week['close_price'].max():,.2f}")
print(f"Low:   ${week['close_price'].min():,.2f}")
print(f"Change: {(week['close_price'].iloc[-1] / week['close_price'].iloc[0] - 1) * 100:.2f}%")
Open:  $68,850.96
Close: $67,627.55
High:  $69,763.24
Low:   $65,913.37
Change: -1.78%
